text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Familiar! Isn't it a lovely morning?! How'd you
sleep last night?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I slept great, by the way! I drank some special
herbal tea that Grandma sent me before I went to
bed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a magical sleep aid made from a bunch of the
herbs in her garden blended together! It works
like a charm!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I could give you some too if you want! You'll see
how amazing Grandma is once you try some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Sweep Tosho is well-rested. The tea
her beloved grandmother gave her seems to have
her feeling energized!
